content.text:
All tests pass. 2 tests passing, 33 todo.

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added a minimal conditional that returns `{ premium: 115 }` when the items array has any items, otherwise returns `{ premium: 5 }` for empty items.
- **Result**: All tests now pass (2 passing, 33 todo)
- **Approach**: Used the simplest possible solution - a hardcoded return value gated by a single conditional on whether items exist. No parsing of item properties (type, material, enchantment, cursed) since the current test doesn't demand it. No calculation of base/first-insurance/fee components since hardcoding 115 is sufficient. Future tests will force the implementation to generalize.
